message:
fix(server): scope alias normalization to send/reply tools and add contact dispatch regression test

Add a comment clarifying that normalize_send_message_arguments is
intentionally gated to send_message and reply_message only, preventing
one tool's alias rewrites from silently mutating another tool's
documented parameter names (e.g., request_contact's from_agent/to_agent
must pass through unchanged).

Add with_serialized_tool_dispatch_env() test helper that sets up an
isolated database, storage root, and project root for end-to-end tool
dispatch tests under a serialization lock.

Add dispatch_request_contact_preserves_contact_parameter_names()
regression test proving that request_contact with from_agent/to_agent
fields works correctly through the full dispatch pipeline without
alias interference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
